seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once. Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
response:
Subject: Thank You - [Your Name] - Internship Program

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

As my internship program with [Department/Lab Name] has successfully concluded, I wanted to take a moment to express my sincere appreciation for the opportunity to work under your guidance this past [duration, e.g., semester/summer].

The experience has been incredibly valuable. I particularly benefited from [mention a specific project, skill learned, or piece of advice]. Your mentorship provided me with a deeper understanding of [mention the field/topic], and I feel significantly more prepared for my future academic and professional pursuits because of your support.

I am truly thankful for the time and effort you invested in my development during this program. The insights you shared have been instrumental in shaping my perspective on [mention a specific area of study].

Thank you once again for this wonderful learning experience. I hope to stay in touch and update you on my progress as I move forward.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID or Contact Information]<turn|>
